title: Single Sign-On
subtitle: Configure identity providers for this tenant. Users can sign in with their IdP credentials and skip password entry.
addProviderSubtitle: Configure a new identity provider for single sign-on.
setupGuidesSubtitle: Expand a provider below to see configuration instructions.
emptyDescription: Add an identity provider to enable single sign-on for your organization.
oidcConfigHint: Required when using OpenID Connect protocol. Leave blank for SAML.
samlConfigHint: Required when using SAML 2.0 protocol. Leave blank for OIDC.
selectDefaultRole: Select default role for new users
autoProvisionLabel: Auto-provision users on first SSO login
enforceSsoLabel: Require SSO (hide password login for this tenant)
testConnectionHint: Verify that the identity provider is reachable and configured correctly.
testSuccess: Connection test successful. Your identity provider is reachable.
linkedUsersWarningTitle: {{count}} user(s) are linked via this provider
linkedUsersWarningBody: Deleting this configuration will prevent these users from signing in via SSO. They will need password-based accounts to continue logging in.
deleteWarning: This will permanently remove this SSO provider configuration. This action cannot be undone.
